name: Mr.RC｜𝟎𝐱𝐔
fullText:
上海之行圆满结束

和很多人说了话，聊了怎么做项目，怎么营销。

最大的收获就是Be Water

测试并使用所有营销方法，渠道，任何人都有机会进行转换，只要你懂得观察

对，懂得观察

然后be water

name: Elon Musk
fullText: I would like to offer to pay the salaries of TSA personnel during this funding impasse that is negatively affecting the lives of so many Americans at airports throughout the country
